creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 221202
Screenshot

From <https://www.freshports.org/editors/tea/>: 

> … Built-in image viewer (PNG, JPEG, GIF, WBMP, BMP, SVG, TIFF, TGA, etc.), converter, and resizer …

– and much the same feature description at <https://tea.ourproject.org/#about>. 

When I open .jpg and .png files I get metadata but not a graphic view of the images. 

Are we maybe missing a dependency?
